SERIES: NO I AM NOT A HUMAN

O my beloved!

Literally leaving hiatus because I love this game dearly, and there is no scenario with her that I'd like. Hope you like it. Whenever I first got the game on the anthology set, I thought she was a boy. I don't know what it says about me, but a lot of the characters I thought were girls / guys were completely flipped around!
Anyways, open definition as usual so you can copy + paste her for your own scenarios. You can also use her for published bots, I would just like if you credited me.

Hopefully soon: Occult lady
